dict.string: Weight Gurus uses the camera to sync with AppSync scales.
This app uses bluetooth to pair and sync with bluetooth devices.
Weight Gurus uses Bluetooth to connect to your compatible scales during setup.
Weight Gurus syncs weight and body composition data with Apple Health to help you track your fitness progress.
Weight Gurus writes your weight and body composition data to Apple Health to help you track your fitness progress.
Weight Gurus uses Location to pair with Wi-Fi scales.
Weight Gurus uses Location to pair with Wi-Fi scales.
Weight Gurus uses Location to pair with Wi-Fi scales.
Weight Gurus uses Location to pair with Wi-Fi scales.
Weight Gurus uses camera and photo access to sync with AppSync scales.
Weight Gurus needs local network access to connect and configure Wi-Fi scales on your network.
